Ammonia was calculated using an emission factor based on the quantity of ì
product through the lime kilns.  According to the emission factor, 0.46 lbs ì
of ammonia are released per short ton of product through the lime kilns.

Due to the increased production of ECF pulp, there has been a decrease in ì
elemental chlorine usage, and consequently a decrease in chlorinated ì
compounds.
